headline: T. ROWE PRICE EXPANDS LEADERSHIP TEAM
summary: T. Rowe Price (NASDAQ: TROW) today announced leadership appointments designed to advance the firm's strategy, enhance its pace of innovation, and deepen its focus on driving successful client outcomes.
